name: codex-usage-overlay
description: A Windows companion overlay for ChatGPT Codex context, quotas, and account usage.

interface.shortDescription: Show ChatGPT Codex context, quotas, and usage.
interface.longDescription: A Windows WPF companion overlay that displays current ChatGPT Codex context remaining, available rate-limit windows, account identity, and lifetime token usage. The 5-hour limit appears only when Codex app-server reports that window.
capabilities: Rate limit and account usage display
interface.defaultPrompt: Launch the Codex Quota Monitor companion from the plugin scripts folder.
